ShortDescription.Value: Adjust school sizes. Increase the number of students, adjust fees

Publish.LongDescription:
### Adjust School Capacity
Change how many students your schools can handle without adding more buildings.
- Lower or increase the number of students. - Buttons to **Reset to Vanilla** defaults or **Quick Start** preset values. - Increase or decrease the fees each student pays. Set all schools to free or double the fees. - Example: a negative fee of -20% means the student household receives a stipend equal to 20% of the normal school fee. - This is not free or magic money. When student households receive money, the city treasury loses the same amount of education-fee income. - Don't forget the like button, it helps people find this mod easier.
### Notes
- Remove other mods that do school student sizing to avoid conflicts. - Before disabling ASC, turn education fees off or press Game Defaults, and return the capacity sliders to 100%. - Mod is compatible with all my other mods. - Mod does not use Harmony patch; means it's more resilient to game updates.
### Support and Feedback - Report issues on Github or Discord links on the right side of this page.
### 13+ Languages Hello, Bonjour, Hallo, Hola, Ciao, こんにちは, 안녕하세요, 你好, 你好, Cześć, Olá, Привіт, Xin chào
### Credits
- River-Mochi – mod author - Inspired by Wayz's original School Capacity (retired) - yenyang - technical support - Joksan, Obelix, Necko1996 – testing
tags: city schools, education capacity, automatic increase school size controller
Publish.ChangeLog: * Added languages Ukrainian and Vietnamese * Elementary and High School sliders now support up to 1000% (fills player request) * Added a school fees and subsidized stipend system. * Updated translations. * Settings changes now save immediately.
